workflow.name: CouchDB Native Cluster HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate CouchDB Native Cluster HA across existing member nodes with bash command steps.

data.label: Prepare CouchDB Native Cluster HA node runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[container-runtime] %s\n' "$*"; }
if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "docker is already installed"
  docker --version
  exit 0
fi
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with apt"
  apt-get update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with dnf"
  dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with yum"
  yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
else
  echo "Unsupported package manager. Install Docker manually." >&2
  exit 1
fi
systemctl enable --now docker
docker version

data.label: Render CouchDB Native Cluster HA node configuration
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[couchdb_native_cluster_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.11.11 10.0.11.12 10.0.11.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.11.11) NODE_NAME='couchdb-01'; NODE_ROLE='couchdb'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.11.12) NODE_NAME='couchdb-02'; NODE_ROLE='couchdb'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.11.13) NODE_NAME='couchdb-03'; NODE_ROLE='couchdb'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

install -d -m 0750 /opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha
install -d -m 0750 /var/lib/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha
cat >/opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha/.env <<EOF
COUCHDB_USER=admin
COUCHDB_PASSWORD=change-me
OCTASTACK_NODE_NAME=$NODE_NAME
OCTASTACK_NODE_ROLE=$NODE_ROLE
OCTASTACK_NODE_INDEX=$NODE_INDEX
CURRENT_IP=$CURRENT_IP
FIRST_NODE_IP=10.0.11.11
CLUSTER_PEERS=10.0.11.11,10.0.11.12,10.0.11.13
SEED_IPS=10.0.11.11,10.0.11.12,10.0.11.13

EOF
chmod 0600 /opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha/.env

cat >/opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml <<'COMPOSE'
services:
  couchdb:
    image: couchdb:3
    container_name: octastack-couchdb
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      COUCHDB_USER: "admin"
      COUCHDB_PASSWORD: "change-me"
      COUCHDB_SECRET: "replace-with-long-random-secret"
      ERL_FLAGS: "-setcookie replace-with-erlang-cookie"
      NODENAME: "couchdb@${CURRENT_IP}"
    volumes:
      - data:/opt/couchdb/data
volumes:
  data: {}
COMPOSE
log "configuration rendered"

data.label: Deploy CouchDB Native Cluster HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[couchdb_native_cluster_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml pull
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml up -d
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/couchdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml ps
      log "node deployment complete"

data.label: Initialize CouchDB Native Cluster HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[couchdb-native-cluster-ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.11.11 10.0.11.12 10.0.11.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.11.11) NODE_NAME='couchdb-01'; NODE_ROLE='couchdb'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.11.12) NODE_NAME='couchdb-02'; NODE_ROLE='couchdb'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.11.13) NODE_NAME='couchdb-03'; NODE_ROLE='couchdb'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

container_ready=0
for attempt in $(seq 1 60); do
  if docker exec octastack-couchdb sh -lc "curl -fsS http://admin:change-me@127.0.0.1:5984/_up" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    container_ready=1
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
if [ "$container_ready" = "1" ]; then
  log "container octastack-couchdb is ready"
else
docker logs octastack-couchdb --tail=120 || true
echo "container octastack-couchdb did not become ready" >&2
exit 1
fi

if [ "$NODE_INDEX" != "1" ]; then
  log "cluster setup is driven by the first CouchDB member"
  exit 0
fi
for member in 10.0.11.11 10.0.11.12 10.0.11.13; do
  curl -fsS -X POST http://admin:change-me@127.0.0.1:5984/_cluster_setup \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    --data-binary @- <<EOF || true
{"action":"enable_cluster","bind_address":"0.0.0.0","username":"admin","password":"change-me","node_count":"3","remote_node":"$member","remote_current_user":"admin","remote_current_password":"change-me"}
EOF
  if [ "$member" != "10.0.11.11" ]; then
    curl -fsS -X POST http://admin:change-me@127.0.0.1:5984/_cluster_setup \
      -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      --data-binary @- <<EOF || true
{"action":"add_node","host":"$member","port":5984,"username":"admin","password":"change-me"}
EOF
  fi
done
curl -fsS -X POST http://admin:change-me@127.0.0.1:5984/_cluster_setup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"action":"finish_cluster"}' || true

data.label: Document CouchDB Native Cluster HA topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/couchdb_native_cluster_ha-topology.md <<'EOF'
# CouchDB Native Cluster HA

Members:
- couchdb-01: 10.0.11.11 (couchdb)
- couchdb-02: 10.0.11.12 (couchdb)
- couchdb-03: 10.0.11.13 (couchdb)

Three CouchDB members run native clustering with a shared cookie/secret and first-member cluster setup calls.
EOF
cat /tmp/couchdb_native_cluster_ha-topology.md

data.label: Validate CouchDB Native Cluster HA node
CouchDB Native Cluster HA health check
